query:
SELECT 
  projectState, 
  COUNT(*) as total_projects,
  SUM(CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts c WHERE c.projectId = p.id AND c.contactStatus = 'send_ready') > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_send_ready_contacts
FROM projects p
GROUP BY projectState 
ORDER BY total_projects DESC;
